items.title: AST SpaceMobile: SpaceX Drawdown Triggers Dip Buying Opportunity - FY2027 Monetization Inflection (Rating Upgrade)
items.excerpt: ASTS accelerates satellite launches, targeting 45 BlueBirds in orbit by year-end while leveraging the strong $3.5B cash position to fund over 100 satellites.

items.title: AST SpaceMobile's Moat Is Growing
items.excerpt: ASTS SpaceMobile has secured partnerships with roughly 60 MNOs, providing access to nearly 3 billion potential subscribers globally. Learn why ASTS stock is a buy.

items.title: AST SpaceMobile Shares Rise on Successful Bluebird Satellite Launches. What This Means for ASTS Stock.
items.excerpt: AST SpaceMobile's next cadence of satellites is also set to launch soon.

items.title: ASTS Stock Pops as AST SpaceMobile Launches Bluebird Satellites
items.excerpt: AST SpaceMobile stock rallied today on the successful launch of BlueBird 8,9, and 10 satellites. But does that warrant buying ASTS shares today?

items.title: AST SpaceMobile announces launch of three new satellites
items.excerpt: AST SpaceMobile has announced the launch of three new BlueBird satellites as part of its satellite-to-mobile service.

items.title: AST SpaceMobile: Commercial Commencement Unlocks Substantial Operating Leverage (ASTS)
items.excerpt: AST SpaceMobile (ASTS) upgraded to Buy with $103 target.

items.title: The Biggest IPO in History Just Put Space Stocks on the Map. Here Are the Ones Built to Win.
items.excerpt: SpaceX's record-setting IPO has investors rushing into space stocks. From Rocket Lab to AST SpaceMobile, here's how to separate the durable winners from the hype in a fast-growing $1 trillion market.

items.title: AST SpaceMobile Makes History in 5G Broadband Cellular Connectivity from Space
items.excerpt: First-ever 5G connection for voice and data between an everyday, unmodified smartphone and a satellite in space.

items.title: T-Mobile Takes Coverage Above and Beyond With SpaceX
items.excerpt: T-Mobile and SpaceX announce Coverage Above and Beyond using Starlink direct-to-cell connectivity.
